Graham Score Rankings
Score vs Analyst Upside
Pipeline
Names worth researching but no capital plan yet. Interesting story, needs more proof before taking a position.
Watch / Setup
Thesis is interesting but waiting for the right price, an earnings beat, or technical confirmation. No position yet.
Starter Buy
First small entry - 25-33% of your intended full position. Gets you skin in the game without over-committing to an unproven name.
Add on Proof
Add to your position only when the company earns it - earnings beat, new contract win, or technical trend confirmation. Never add just because price fell.
Trim / Exit
Near the upside target, too extended, or the thesis is broken. Reduce into strength - don't wait for a perfect top. Thesis-break = non-negotiable exit.
